ddt:Target.Name: EWR21_L47_V4x_64_v2.8
ddt:Target.Description:
Gasoline - EWR21 Vehicules : L43 Motorisations : V4U/V4Y Logiciels : 64Cx Co-auteurs : Kwiyoung Park tel : 82-31-289-8343 kwiyoung.park@renaultsamsungm.com Seokju Kim tel : 82-31-289-8353 seokju.kim@renaultsamsungM.com
Based On : EWR21_L47_64_v1.3.xml
CCSL Part 1. Connection Update
EWR21_L43_V4x_64_v1.7 - 20081222 DTC correction for Commonization with M4R
EWR21_L43_V4x_64_v1.8 - 20090112 DTC correction for some errors(Not common with M4R) Fuel level sensor DTCs Update
EWR21_L43_V4x_64_v1.9 - 20090210 DID Update P0463(15) Fuel level gauge High Input diagnosis (FGPNGH)) - Delete
EWR21_L43_V4x_64_v2.0 - 20090401 DID Update (Error Correction)
EWR21_L43_V4x_64_v2.1 - 20090525 Screen Update DTC Modification (0833(29)- Deletion) $21AC Request Add - Auxiliary Diag Information
EWR21_L43_V4x_64_v2.1 - 20090914 Request / Screen Update by 64C6SW
EWR21_L43_V4x_64_v2.2 - 20090626 Screen Update DTC Info Modification (P0571-> P0504) DTC Fault type change(053011,053015 -> 053016, 053017) $23 Adress change due to 64C6 SW delivery
EWR21_L43_V4x_64_v2.3 - 20100316 Screen Update - ACC screen delete (Acc is not applied in L43 xZV) $23 Adress change due to 64C7 SW delivery
EWR21_L43_V4x_64_v2.4 - 20100709 Screen Update
EWR21_L43_V4x_64_v2.5 - 20101105 64D0 application - DMS/STCCM $23 Adress name change(DataRead => RMBA) Homologation number change(82010 => 82011)
EWR21_L4x_V4x_64_v2.6 - 20101105 Change the name of xml. (L43 -> L4x) 64D0 application - STCCM-L47 Update
EWR21_L4x_V4x_64_v2.7 - 20110228 Change the name of xml. (L43 -> L4x) 64D1 application
EWR21_L4x_V4x_64_v2.8 - 20110325 Change the name of xml. (L43 -> L4x) 64D2 application
